prompt_text:
### Demographics: 74-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 20 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 65.5 kg; Height 166.6 cm; BMI 23.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 137/82 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.7%; 9 months ago 7.8%; 6 months ago 8.1%; 3 months ago 7.8%; current 7.9%), FPG (12 months ago 169mg/dL; 9 months ago 161mg/dL; 6 months ago 184mg/dL; 3 months ago 159mg/dL; current 163mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 66.1kg; 9 months ago 63.3kg; 6 months ago 62.9kg; 3 months ago 65.2kg; current 65.5kg), Height (12 months ago 166.6cm; 9 months ago 166.6cm; 6 months ago 166.6cm; 3 months ago 166.6cm; current 166.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 23.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 140mmHg; 9 months ago 140mmHg; 6 months ago 139mmHg; 3 months ago 138mmHg; current 137mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 78mmHg; 6 months ago 80mmHg; 3 months ago 79mmHg; current 82mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 22U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 19U/L), AST (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 21U/L; 3 months ago 17U/L; current 20U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 7.1mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 9.7mL/min/1.73m²; current 7mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 729mg/g; 9 months ago 836mg/g; 6 months ago 660mg/g; 3 months ago 710mg/g; current 823mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 92mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 96mg/dL; 3 months ago 90mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 170mg/dL; 9 months ago 152mg/dL; 6 months ago 168mg/dL; 3 months ago 150mg/dL; current 160mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 9.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.25 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
